description_long: This is a roughly hewn, blocky stone with an irregular, angular shape and a coarse-grained texture. Its surface is predominantly gray with darker speckles, suggesting it is likely granite or a similar igneous rock. The stone has a rugged, natural appearance, with uneven edges and a slightly weathered look, indicating it may have been exposed to the elements. One face of the stone features a visible marking or code, possibly for cataloging or identification purposes. The overall form is asymmetrical, with one side appearing flatter and the others more jagged and protruding. Its substantial mass and hard surface make it suitable as a physical barrier or obstacle in urban environments such as parks, sidewalks, or landscaped areas.
description: A coarse, gray, speckled stone with an irregular, blocky shape and rugged, weathered surfaces. Its substantial mass and hard texture make it ideal as an urban obstacle or barrier.
description_view_0: This view shows the stone's tall, rectangular face with a rough, speckled surface and slightly rounded top edge.
description_view_1: The top-down view reveals the stone's irregular, angular outline and a visible black marking or code on its surface.
description_view_2: This angle highlights the broad, uneven face of the stone, showing its coarse texture and jagged edges.
description_view_3: The side view displays the stone's most rugged and protruding surface, emphasizing its natural, unshaped form.
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature or used as a barrier along pathways
attribute_pattern: Mottled speckling with irregular dark mineral grains scattered throughout the gray matrix; no artificial carvings or regular patterns.
attribute_weathering: Slightly weathered with a rough, unpolished surface and minor edge rounding, indicating moderate exposure to outdoor elements.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Typically contrasts with smoother, man-made surfaces but can blend with other natural stones or landscaping elements; may be partially surrounded by soil or low vegetation.
